discard.name: survivor_discard_keep_dodge_and_roll
discard.chosen: discard Dodge and Roll (loses the +4 next-turn block)

discard.name: gamble_with_tactician_in_hand
discard.chosen: Calculated Gamble (discards Tactician → triggers Sly energy)

synergy.name: wraith_form_with_intangible_attack_turn
synergy.chosen: Wraith Form (Intangible 2 — next 2 turns take 1 dmg max)

combo.name: finisher_after_attacks
combo.chosen: Dagger Throw (9 dmg, also scales Finisher)

combo.name: neutralize_before_calculated_gamble
combo.chosen: Calculated Gamble FIRST (discards Neutralize, loses the Weak)

combo.name: burst_skip_when_no_skills_available
combo.chosen: Burst (redundant: stacks but no Skill to double)

combo.name: infinite_blades_skip_low_hp_kill
combo.chosen: Infinite Blades (Power — pointless if kill this turn)

combo.name: combo_accuracy_before_blade_dance_single_turn
combo.chosen: Accuracy FIRST — Blade Dance hits for 21

combo.name: combo_expose_before_predator_not_strike
combo.chosen: Expose first — Vulnerable scales both attacks

block_cards.name: blur_keeps_block
block_cards.chosen: Blur (5 block, carries to next turn)

block_cards.name: block_defend_over_backflip_exhausted_pile
block_cards.chosen: Backflip (5 block, draw 2 WHIFFS with empty pile)

block_cards.name: block_one_defend_enough_at_damage_5
block_cards.chosen: Strike (6 dmg) — use 2nd energy for offense

draw_cycle.name: calculated_gamble_dead_hand
draw_cycle.chosen: Calculated Gamble (discard hand, draw same #, exhaust)

powers.name: double_damage_biggest_attack
powers.chosen: Dagger Throw (9 dmg x2 = 18, uses Double Damage efficiently)

powers.name: weak_player_defers_attack
powers.chosen: Footwork (Dex+, scales all future block — better with Weak active)

powers.name: noxious_fumes_skip_redundant_poison
powers.chosen: Dagger Throw (9 dmg — Fumes handles poison stacking for free)

powers.name: accuracy_blade_dance_over_strike
powers.chosen: Blade Dance (3 shivs at (2+3)=5 each = 15 dmg via Accuracy)

relic.name: cloak_clasp_end_turn_early
relic.chosen: End turn (gain 4 block from Cloak Clasp)
